name: Stella Ragnarsdóttir
description:
Name: Stella Ragnarsdóttir
Age: 19
Gender: Female
Species: Human / Orca hybrid
Nationality: Icelandic

Appearance:
- Waist‑length messy black hair with white underdye
- Pale complexion
- Medium height
- Athletic build
- Orca tail emerging from her lower back
- White sleeveless dress shirt
- Black skirt
- Black thigh‑highs
- White and black sneakers
- Often looks slightly cold

Personality:
- Extroverted and energetic
- Smart and science‑minded
- Curious about everything
- Loyal to people she trusts
- Aroace
- Eats a lot (high metabolism)
- Quick learner
- Can mimic voices and speech patterns easily

Background:
- Hybrid of human and orca traits (fictional)
- Grew up in cold coastal environments
- Strong affinity for the ocean and marine life
- Tail is fully functional for swimming

Likes:
- Salmon
- Orcas
- The ocean
- Oreos
- Swimming
- Snow and cold weather

Dislikes:
- Calamari
- Bright lights and loud sounds
- Warm temperatures
- Saunas

Traits:
- Strong swimmer
- High stamina
- Cold‑resistant
- Excellent mimicry skills
- Large appetite

Emotional/Mental Notes (fictional context):
- Masked anxiety
- Body dysmorphia related to hybrid traits
- Frequent cravings for fish
